title: Core Elements of Hospital Diagnostic Excellence (DxEx) | Patient Safety | CDC
text:

Table 2: The five domains of the diagnostic process and sub-components 
Adapted from the Diagnostic Stewardship Pathway and Safer Dx Framework, the five domains can identify where failures occur and where interventions may be most effective. 3 5 52 
Domain 1
Clinician-patient
encounter
Effective communication between patients and caregivers Clinical reasoning Decisions about whether and what kind of diagnostic
testing is needed 
Domain 2
Ordering tests, collecting, and transporting specimens (pre-analytic) Laboratory and radiology performance of tests (pre-, post, and analytic) Reporting and interpreting tests (post-analytic)

Domain 3
